reviews.comment:
.muy limpio y tranquilo. Baños limpios. Poca variedad p comprar víveres y alto el precio. Las mesitas, bancos y espacio de atrás ideal p un alto en el camino.

(Translated by Google)
Very clean and quiet. Clean bathrooms. Limited variety for groceries, and high prices. The tables, benches, and space in the back are ideal for a stopover.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoakpudFNBEAE

Excellent service...as always, the quality and price are great at YPF.

reviews.comment:
Muy bien como todas las ypf.
No es full por lo que no es taaaaan linda, pero está bastante bien. Variedad de productos y buenos precios, los sanguches muy ricos !
La limpieza de los baños excelente.
Otra cosa, me encantaron los jueguitos de atrás ! Los columpios y subibajas

(Translated by Google)
Very good, like all YPF stores.
It's not full, so it's not that pretty, but it's pretty good. There's a variety of products and good prices, and the sandwiches are delicious!
The bathrooms are excellently clean.
Another thing: I loved the games in the back! The swings and seesaws.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCei1QaEdnEAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Te esconden el código qr ,no podes pagar con la app YPF ,los baños clausurados para q no los uses.
Horrible atención al turista

(Translated by Google)
They hide the QR code, you can't pay with the YPF app, and the bathrooms are closed so you can't use them.
Horrible tourist service

(Translated by Google)
